user.title: User Profile
user.description: User account information and match stats.

username.description: The custom username of the player.

global_highscore.description: The maximum solo/PvP score of this user.

total_matches_played.description: The number of PvP and Solo matches played.

total_wins.description: The number of matches won in PvP.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores profile details and global game statistics for authenticated players mapping to their Firebase user UID.
